Class AccountJpaEntity

java.lang.Object
com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.AccountJpaEntity
@Entity public class AccountJpaEntity extends Object
JPA entity adapter for the accounts table.

This class is an infrastructure concern and is never exposed to the application or domain layers. The

invalid reference 
AccountPersistenceAdapter
translates between this entity and the Account domain object.

The version field participates in optimistic locking: JPA automatically appends a WHERE version = ? clause to every UPDATE statement, causing a OptimisticLockException if a concurrent modification has already incremented the version.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private BigDecimal
    balance
    Current balance stored as NUMERIC(19,4).
    private Instant
    createdAt
    Record creation timestamp.
    private String
    currency
    ISO 4217 currency code stored as a fixed-length string.
    private UUID
    customerId
    Foreign key reference to the owning customer.
    private UUID
    id
    Surrogate primary key; maps to the domain id.
    private AccountStatus
    status
    Account lifecycle state.
    private Instant
    updatedAt
    Timestamp of the last modification.
    private Long
    version
    Optimistic locking version counter; managed by JPA.

    Description

    Default no-arg constructor required by the JPA specification.

    Full constructor used by the persistence adapter when mapping from the domain object.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private UUID id
      Surrogate primary key; maps to the domain id.

    • customerId

      private UUID customerId
      Foreign key reference to the owning customer.

    • balance

      private BigDecimal balance
      Current balance stored as NUMERIC(19,4).

    • currency

      private String currency
      ISO 4217 currency code stored as a fixed-length string.

    • status

      private AccountStatus status
      Account lifecycle state.

    • version

      private Long version
      Optimistic locking version counter; managed by JPA.

    • createdAt

      private Instant createdAt
      Record creation timestamp.

    • updatedAt

      private Instant updatedAt
      Timestamp of the last modification.

  • Constructor Details

    • AccountJpaEntity

      protected AccountJpaEntity()
      Default no-arg constructor required by the JPA specification.

    • AccountJpaEntity

      public AccountJpaEntity(UUID id, UUID customerId, BigDecimal balance, String currency, AccountStatus status, Long version, Instant createdAt, Instant updatedAt)
      Full constructor used by the persistence adapter when mapping from the domain object.
      Parameters:
      id - the account UUID
      customerId - the owning customer UUID
      balance - the current balance
      currency - the ISO 4217 currency code
      status - the account status
      version - the optimistic lock version
      createdAt - the creation timestamp
      updatedAt - the last-updated timestamp

      Returns:
      the account UUID

      Returns:

    • getStatus

      Returns:
      the account status

      public void setStatus(AccountStatus status)
      Parameters:
      status - the new account status

    • getVersion

      public Long getVersion()
      Returns:
      the optimistic lock version

    • getCreatedAt

      Returns:
      the creation timestamp

      Returns:
      the last-updated timestamp

    • setUpdatedAt

      public void setUpdatedAt(Instant updatedAt)
      Parameters:
      updatedAt - the new last-updated timestamp
